# setTimerToFireImmediately(_:)

**Instance Method**

Sets the timer dispatch source to fire immediately once, overriding any previous calls.

## Declaration

```swift
func setTimerToFireImmediately<T>(_ timer: T) throws where T : DispatchSourceTimer
```

## Setting Timers

- **setTimerNextFireTime(_:fireTime:)**: Sets the time on the timebase’s timeline at which the timer should fire next.
- **setTimerNextFireTime(_:fireTime:)**: Sets the time on the timebase’s timeline at which the timer dispatch source should fire next.
- **setTimerToFireImmediately(_:)**: Sets the timer to fire immediately once, overriding any previous calls.
